title: Vegan Irish Lamb Wrap
description: A flavorful wrap filled with roasted vegetables and a tangy Irish slaw.

ingredients.name: Irish slaw (made with cabbage, carrots, and apple cider vinegar)

instructions: Toss sweet potatoes and Brussels sprouts with a little oil and roast for 20-25 minutes.
Char the red onion by grilling or broiling until slightly blackened.
Assemble the slaw by mixing together shredded cabbage, grated carrots, and apple cider vinegar.
Spread hummus on the wrap, then top with roasted vegetables, Irish slaw, and charred onion.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve.
Prepare the Irish slaw and hummus before assembling the wrap.
